description: Human-readable counter catalog (supplements counter_manifest_v1.json). Edit alongside manifest when adding aggregate outputs.

counters.name: event_count_5m
counters.title: Events (5 minutes)
counters.notes: Sliding window event count for burst detection.

counters.name: event_count_1h
counters.title: Events (1 hour)
counters.notes: Primary hourly velocity for rules and inference.

counters.name: event_count_24h
counters.title: Events (24 hours)
counters.notes: Daily volume; used with hourly for concentration checks.

counters.name: event_count_7d
counters.title: Events (7 days)
counters.notes: Weekly baseline for slower-moving fraud rings.

counters.name: distinct_session_id_24h
counters.title: Distinct sessions (24 hours)
counters.notes: Requires session_id on evaluate payload / features.
